title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Emeritus - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Emeritus - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Emeritus, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Curriculum Developer for our Patna operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Emeritus:
Emeritus is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Mentoring

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Emeritus!
